_meta.notes: The Petitioner — a voice from the Revenant's past. Returns at the chapel bell mid-arc; arrives in person at turn>=4. Non-recurring; bound to the refuse-the-bell beat-pack. Their petition is the test of the Revenant's refusal. They do not threaten; they ask. The cost of refusing them is exactly the cost the form is designed to spend.

tagline: a name from a long time ago, returned to ask one more time.
